description: Determine the maximum shipping distance in km for a 500 kg (0.5 ton) pallet using the USLCI 'Transport, combination truck, long-haul, diesel powered' process and TRACI 2.1 LCIA methods (available in ~/LCA_Imports/) to achieve a Global Warming Potential (GWP) of 50.0 kg CO₂ eq (± 1.0 kg). The analysis must utilize a process named 'Distribution Leg - 500kg Pallet' and a global parameter 'distance_km' with the transport exchange formula 'distance_km * 0.5'. Save the final LCIA result to ~/LCA_Results/optimized_result.csv and the optimized distance value to ~/LCA_Results/max_distance.txt.
